About the Route:

Mission Foods Route For Sale Tulsa OK: $110,000. This route covers part of Bixby OK, Glenpool Ok, Jenks OK. Protected Territory through Mission Foods. Established route with 6 accounts including Walmart, Harps, Reasors. Mission Foods requires an inventory deposit when route is purchased. This deposit is refunded when the route is sold. Contact Routes R Us for specific details. Annual Sales of $577,783 and an annual gross cash flow of $98,221. Mission Foods distributes tortillas, chips, dips, wraps, flat breads, gluten free products and more. Route delivers 2 days a week. (Monday, Thursday) Route merchandises 2 additional days per week.

Average weekly sales of $11,111 with an average gross weekly income of $1,889. Distributor earns an average blended commission of 17% of the route’s sales. A truck is available for purchase in addition to this route. Potential to increase income through corporate promotions and/or acquiring additional customers. Independent distributors are responsible for providing service to customers per the distribution agreement. A distributor agreement with Mission Foods is required. Mission Foods may conduct credit and/or background checks new distributors. Mission Foods requires all distributors to have an LLC.
